JUDGE DONNA HITCHENS, CLERK RANI EDWARDS, REPORTER PATTY VAN STEENBERGE. MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF DEC-22-2003 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON DEC-22-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 218, SUE M KAPLAN FOR PROVE UP; DEFENDAN NOT PRESENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHOREVIEW APARTMENTS, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARTER, JOHNNIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 25 ESPANOLA ST., #4, SAN FRANCISCO. $1,279.60 RENT, $255.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,534.60, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHOREVIEW APARTMENTS, LP AS TO DEFENDANT CARTER, JOHNNIE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT JOHNNIE CARTER'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT: DEMURRER OVERRULED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. TENTATIVE RULING IS MODIFIED AS TO CCP SECTION 128.7 SANCTION: DENIED; HOWEVER, DEFENDANT CARTER IS ADMONISHED THAT THE ARGUMENT IN THIS DEMURRER IS THE SAME ARGUMENT THAT THE COURT STATED WAS LEGALLY INSUFFICIENT IN THE PREVIOUS DEMURRER HEARD ON 10/6/03. DEFENDANT WAS TOLD THAT ANY SUBSEQUENT DEMURRER WOULD NOT BE SUSTAINED. COURT ORDERS THE PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE AN COURT. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR# 1558

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-22-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-22-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rhonda Aquilina.
Linda Reyes, Esq., for Plaintiff: Shoreview Apartments.
No appearance by the Defendant: Johnnie Carter.
09:20 am. - Plaintiff's witness, Cristal Ivy the authorized agent was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Lease agreement --------------------- ID/EVID.
PLTF EXH #2 - Notice to pay or quit --------------- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises at: 25 Espanola St., #4, San Francisco.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of 1,279.60
Costs of $255.00
For the total of $1,534.60
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Raymond Erlach, Court Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott & Marta Vallejo. No reporter

Appearances: Linda Reyes, Esq. for Plaintiff
Chrystal Ivy, Manager for Shoreview Apts.
Defendant, Johnnie Carter in propria persona

Off Calendar from the settlement calendar. Case did not settle. Trial date remains.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-24-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: JOHNNIE CARTER, In Propria Persona, (415) 822-2751, Moving Party

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES. DEFENDANT JOHNNIE CARTER'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT: Demurrer overruled with 5 days leave to answer. Tentative Ruling is modified as to CCP Section 128.7 sanction: DENIED; however, Defendant Carter is admonished that the argument in this demurrer is the same argument that the Court stated was legally insufficient in the previous demurrer heard on 10/6/03. Defendant was told that any subsequent demurrer would not be sustained. Court orders the prevailing party to prepare an Court. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-06-2003 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Johnnie L. Carter appearing in propria persona 822-2751, demurring party
Linda N. Reyes, Esq. of KIMBALL, TIREY & ST. JOHN 925/469-1690, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT JOHNNIE CARTER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- SUSTAIN WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. (301/JLW/SL) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
